access_token.description: LaunchDarkly access token. Sent verbatim (no "Bearer" prefix) as the Authorization header; never logged.

base_url.description: LaunchDarkly API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_key.description: LaunchDarkly project key. Required only for the flags and environments streams, which are scoped to a single project.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
